description: Devil's-advocate review of a risky design / architecture / tradeoff decision BEFORE implementation. Single specialist (overthinker, READ_ONLY, 4-phase chain-of-thought). Output is a structured premortem memo with explicit uncertainty + actionable mitigations. Forces the orchestrator to consult overthinker before high-stakes work.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: (the risky design / architecture choice / tradeoff being considered)
SCOPE: design space; no specific file scope (this is pre-impl analysis).
NON_GOALS: NO implementation; no architecture lock-in (premortem informs the decision, doesn't make it); no executor dispatch from this chain.
VALIDATION: overthinker produces 4-phase premortem memo (initial analysis → critique → synthesis → distilled recommendation).
ACCEPTANCE: operator has explicit list of risks + mitigations + uncertainty markers; operator decides whether to proceed, modify, or abandon.

Premortem chain — devil's advocate before commitment.

steps.title: overthinker:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: 4-phase devil's-advocate review of root's design proposal. READ_ONLY.
INPUTS: root's PROBLEM + design proposal narrative.
OUTPUTS: structured 4-phase markdown:
  Phase 1 — Initial Analysis: goals, constraints, assumptions, unknowns.
  Phase 2 — Devil's Advocate: challenge every assumption; what could go wrong; what was missed; steelman opposing views.
  Phase 3 — Synthesis: integrate critiques; resolve contradictions; acknowledge tradeoffs.
  Phase 4 — Final Answer: distilled recommendation with explicit uncertainty + concrete mitigations.
SCOPE: design space; no file scope.
NON_GOALS: NO file edits; no implementation; no architecture decisions (recommend, don't decide).
